op.ROSSI.potential.1.event.description.text: Battle skill Crimson Shadow and combo skill Moment of Blazing Shadow improved: The DMG Multipliers of these skills are increased to 1.15 times of the original. Wolven Ambrage of the battle skill also returns 10 SP after hitting the enemy.

op.ROSSI.potential.3.event.description.text: Talent Seething Blood improved: When triggered, it grants Base DMG Multiplier +8% and restores HP +[Intellect x 04].

op.ROSSI.potential.4.event.description.text: Ultimate "Razorclaw" Ambuscade improved: Ultimate Energy cost -15%.

op.ROSSI.potential.5.event.description.text: Ultimate "Razorclaw" Ambuscade improved: DMG Multiplier is increased to 1.1 times of the original; Critical DMG Dealt is increased by +30%.

op.ROSSI.skill.CRIMSON_SHADOW.event.desc.text: Charges to the target to deal Physical DMG and apply Lift.

op.ROSSI.skill.CRIMSON_SHADOW_EMPOWERED..text: Charges to the target to deal Physical DMG and apply Lift. If the target already has Vulnerability stack(s), the skill also unleashes a Wolven Ambrage that charges at the target to deal Heat DMG.

op.ROSSI.skill.MOMENT_OF_BLAZING_SHADOW..text: When an enemy has both Vulnerability and Arts Infliction stacks. Fire erupts beneath the enemy's feet, dealing Physical DMG.

op.ROSSI.skill.MOMENT_OF_BLAZING_SHADOW_.text: Consumes all Arts Infliction stacks on the target, dealing Physical DMG scaled by the number of stacks consumed. Applies Lift and grants increased Critical Rate and Critical DMG Dealt.

op.ROSSI.skill.RAZORCLAW_AMBUSCADE.event.text: Rossi flutters her cape and unleashes a flurry of stabs that quickly deals multiple sequences of Heat DMG to the target. She then performs a two-sequence slash attack with her dagger that deals massive Heat DMG and applies Heat Infliction. When this skill successfully scores a critical hit, it deals higher Critical DMG.

op.ROSSI.skill.SEETHING_WOLFBLOOD_BATK.e.text: An attack with up to 5 sequences that deals Physical DMG.

op.ROSSI.skill.SEETHING_WOLFBLOOD_DIVE.e.text: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies.

op.ROSSI.skill.SEETHING_WOLFBLOOD_FINISH.text: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP. Final Strike also deals 18 Stagger.

op.ROSSI.status.BLAZING_SHADOW_CRIT.even.text: Combo skill Moment of Blazing Shadow grants increased Critical Rate and Critical DMG Dealt.

op.ROSSI.status.PERFECT_TIMING.event.des.text: Combo timing window. Applied by Normal combo on last frame. Consumed by Empowered combo activation. Duration until end of activation window.

op.ROSSI.status.RAZOR_CLAWMARK.event.des.text: Target takes Physical DMG per second and increased Physical + Heat DMG. Applied by Wolven Ambrage (Nicks and Scratches talent). Non-stacking. Tick interval: 1s.

op.ROSSI.talent.NICKS_AND_SCRATCHES_T1.e.text: After Wolven Ambrage activates, applies Razor Clawmark to target. While active: target takes Physical DMG per second and increased Physical + Heat DMG taken. Effect baked into battle skill Crimson Shadow.

op.ROSSI.talent.SEETHING_BLOOD_T2.event..text: When Rossi's skill deals Critical DMG to a Razor Clawmarked enemy, triggers another hit dealing Heat DMG (ATK%) and restoring HP (INT%). If target is also Combusted, DMG and heal are 1.5x. Trigger interval: 1s (P3: 0.5s). P3: +8% ATK DMG, +INT x0.04 heal.
